name: Mariah Graybill
ai_summary: Mariah Graybill brings camp counseling experience and a compassionate approach to working with children, with availability for both full-time and part-time shifts in the Augusta, GA area. She demonstrates strong conflict resolution skills and a genuine passion for child development, making her a promising candidate for the UpKid teaching role.
